function get_stream_from_features()
dim oStream : set oStream = nx_.nxm_features.test_get_stream(doc_, "name") dim pSO : set pSO = doc_.createstreamobj() pSO.attach oStream 'pSO.rewind 'pSO.save "C:\temp\test_data\x123.html" pSO.rewind dim strTxt : strTxt = pSO.getstring() set pSO = nothing msgbox strTxt end function
function create_sales_document_data_hive dim idata_reader set idata_reader = nx_.nxm_features.upu.create_sales_document_data_hive(trans_.get_this(), "sales_invoice", "188652") end function
function get_check_bank_account
nx_.nxm_features.save_logo_file trans_.get_this() exit function
dim strAnswer strAnswer = nx_.nxm_features.verify_pl_bank_account("XXXXXX", "XXXXXX", trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)) msgbox strAnswer end function
function get_addresses_by_zip
dim strDescFileName : strDescFileName = "C:\Temp\adresy\adres.txt" dim so: set so = doc_.createstreamobj()
dim oBSArr oBSArr = nx_.nxm_features.get_addresses_by_zip("58-560")
dim oBS dim iBS, strLine for iBS = 1 to UBound(oBSArr) set oBS = oBSArr(iBS) strLine = "CountryName = " + oBS.CountryName + ", " +_ "CountryCode = " + oBS.CountryCode + ", " +_ "TopAdminUnitName = " + oBS.TopAdminUnitName + ", " +_ "TopAdminUnitCode = " + oBS.TopAdminUnitCode + ", " +_ "SubAdminUnitName = " + oBS.SubAdminUnitName + ", " +_ "SubAdminUnitCode = " + oBS.SubAdminUnitCode + ", " +_ "BaseAdminUnitName = " + oBS.BaseAdminUnitName + ", " +_ "BaseAdminUnitCode = " + oBS.BaseAdminUnitCode + ", " +_ "LocalityName = " + oBS.LocalityName + ", " +_ "LocalityCode = " + oBS.LocalityCode + ", " +_ "StreetName = " + oBS.StreetName + ", " +_ "ZIPCode = " + oBS.ZIPCode + ", " +_ "PostOffice = " + oBS.PostOffice + vbNewLine + vbNewLine so.write strLine 'trans_.message 0,0, strLine next
so.save strDescFileName end function
function test_parse_bank
dim oTrans : Set oTrans = trans_.get_this()
nx_.test doc_, page_.ctrl(163), clng(13525)
exit function
'dim oParamDict : set oParamDict = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
'oParamDict.Add "access_level", "full" 'oParamDict.Add "source_currency", "PLN" 'oParamDict.Add "target_currency", "EUR" 'oParamDict.Add "xrate", ccur(4.3073)
'oParamDict.Add "product_id", clng(5109) 'oParamDict.Add "warehouse_id", clng(1) 'oParamDict.Add "detail", "prod"
dim oHQR : set oHQR = doc_.nxm_net_.new_host_query("eb_available_deliveries") with oHQR .value_param "product_id", clng(5109) .value_param "sales_warehouse_id", clng(1) .value_param "reservation_warehouse_id", clng(0) .range_param "realization_date", 5, DateAdd("d", 14, trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)), Nothing end with
Dim oNXMRS : Set oNXMRS = oHQR.execute()
while not oNXMRS.eof trans_.message 0,0, cstr(oNXMRS.fields("display").value) oNXMRS.movenext wend
end function
function export_edi_wz dim pM60255: set pM60255 = doc_.getmodule(60255) dim strPath: strPath = "C:\Temp\wz_edi.xml" dim strMsg: strMsg = pM60255.dokmag_to_ecod(134443, N5REJESTRDOK__WZ, strPath) end function
function test_pdf dim pM60400 : set pM60400 = doc_.getmodule(60400) dim path : path = pM60400.navo_client_make_pdf(10129, 67334 , 0) msgbox path end function
function test_store_apply_document if get_navo_cocoon_version() = "" then msgbox "apilevel=0" exit function end if dim strError : strError = nx_.features.store_apply_document(trans_.get_this(), 1163970, false, true, false)
end function function test_store_flush
dim oSvrTrans : set oSvrTrans = trans_.CreateServerExtension("navo.cocoon.store.store_transaction")
dim strError : strError = oSvrTrans.store_flush( false, true) end function
function test_navo_client
nx_.features.test trans_.get_this() trans_.message 0,0,"called"
end function
function test_nxm_easy dim oService
set oService = createobject("nxm.easy.biz.infeco.company_registration_data_service") oService.setting_signalr_server_url = "http://nxm.com.pl:1308"
oService.trace_file = "C:\temp\nxm.easy.trace.txt" oService.begin_get "PL_REGON", "XXXXXX", null
if oService.state = "verify_captcha" then oService.save_captcha_to "c:\temp\captcha.jpg"
dim strCaptchaText : strCaptchaText = InputBox("enter captcha from c:\temp\captcha.jpg") oService.verify_captcha strCaptchaText
if oService.state <> "data_ready" then msgbox "wrong captcha" exit function end if
else if oService.state <> "data_ready" then msgbox "State:" + oService.state end if end if
dim oCompanyData : set oCompanyData = oService.get_company_data() msgbox oCompanyData.FullName
set oService = nothing
end function
function test_make_storno dim strRejestrPP : strRejestrPP = "Rejestr przychodów z produkcji (PP) 2016" dim IdLocalPP : IdLocalPP = nx_fire_choice_list_disable_addnew(TYPEID_N5DOKMAG, "Wybór przychodu produkcyjnego", _ "pRejestrDok in (select IdObj from n5rejestrdok where strNazwa='" + strRejestrPP + "') ") if IdLocalPP <= 0 then exit function end if
dim pLocalPP : set pLocalPP = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5DOKMAG, IdLocalPP)
trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_DOKUMENTOW) = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5REJESTRDOK, "strNazwa='Rozchody wewnętrzne (RW) 2016'") trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_TYP) = clng(N5REJESTRDOK__RW)
dim oLocalRW : set oLocalRW = trans_.newobj(TYPEID_N5DOKMAG)
oLocalRW.n5dokmag_copy pLocalPP, true, false
trans_.saveobjects
end function
function test_remote2
dim strRemoteServer : strRemoteServer = "" if strRemoteServer = "" then strRemoteServer = "127.0.0.1" end if
dim pM60214 : set pM60214 = doc_.getmodule(60214) dim pRC : set pRC = pM60214.new_remote_client_ex(strRemoteServer, "EuroBusiness 5.0", "navo2002", false) if pRC is nothing then exit function end if
trans_.var(3014) = 1 dim pM60329 : set pM60329 = doc_.getmodule(60329)
dim oBOWIArray : set oBOWIArray = pM60329.select_pw_produkcyjne_nieskojarzone(pRC, "Przychody wewnętrzne (PW) 2016")
dim IdRemotePW : IdRemotePW = nx_fire_array_choice_list(0, "Nieskojarzone PW produkcyjne", "Wartość", oBOWIArray) trans_.message 0,0,cstr(IdRemotePW)
dim pLocalPP : set pLocalPP = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5DOKMAG, 78953) dim oCompareArray : set oCompareArray = pM60329.compare_pw_produkcyjne_pozycje(pRC, IdRemotePW, pLocalPP)
end function
function test_remote dim pM60214 : set pM60214 = doc_.getmodule(60214)
dim pRC : set pRC = pM60214.new_remote_client_ex("127.0.0.1", "EuroBusiness 5.0 BIS", "navo2002bis", false) if pRC is nothing then exit function end if
'trans_.message 0,0, pRC.page.hello()
dim oRemoteECWS : set oRemoteECWS = pRC.document.getmodule(60332) dim bSignedIn : bSignedIn = oRemoteECWS.ecws3_init("Administrator", "")
dim oEBProduct : set oEBProduct = createobject("navo_ecws_3_data.product") with oEBProduct .Code = "QWER-12" .Name = "QWERty2" .ProductGroupName = "Namioty" .UnitAbbr = "szt." end with
dim strResult: strResult = oRemoteECWS.ecws3_save_product(oEBProduct) trans_.message 0,0, strResult exit function
'dim oRemoteRS : set oRemoteRS = oRemoteECWS.ecws3_open_recordset("select top 3 * from n5uzytkownik") 'do while not oRemoteRS.EOF ' trans_.message 0,0, cstr(oRemoteRS(2).Value) ' oRemoteRS.MoveNext 'loop
dim oEBDocument : set oEBDocument = createobject("navo_ecws_3_data.eb_document")
oEBDocument.DocumentType = "GR" oEBDocument.CustomerCode = "2007/4/8091" oEBDocument.RegisterName = "Przychody zewnętrzne (PZ) 2016" oEBDocument.DestinationStoreName = "1 Surowce/Opakowania Piotrowice 119"
dim iter for iter = 1 to 5 dim oEBDocumentLine : set oEBDocumentLine = createobject("navo_ecws_3_data.eb_document_line") oEBDocumentLine.ProductCode = "SU 00787" oEBDocumentLine.Quantity = ccur(1.0) oEBDocumentLine.UnitPriceNettoDocCur = ccur(iter * iter)
oEBDocument.ArrLines.Add oEBDocumentLine next
strResult = oRemoteECWS.ecws3_save_document(oEBDocument) trans_.message 0,0, strResult end function
function mysql_security dim g_strDNS_SISCO_PL:g_strDNS_SISCO_PL = "Provider=MSDASQL.1;Persist Security Info=True;Data Source=security_monpatrol" dim g_pExportManager_SISCO_PL : set g_pExportManager_SISCO_PL = new CADOExportManager dim g_bResult_SISCO_PL: g_bResult_SISCO_PL = g_pExportManager_SISCO_PL.connectDSN(g_strDNS_SISCO_PL, "", "") dim oRS : set oRS = g_pExportManager_SISCO_PL.getConnection().execute("Select * from navo_export") while not oRS.eof oRS.movenext wend end function
function przenumerowanie_magazynu_surowce_w_hk dim idMag:idMag=43 dim iNumOper : iNumOper = page_.ctrl(101).value dim oADO: set oADO = trans_.createadors(_ "select idobj,ddatawyst,strnrdok, case ntypdok when 18 then 11 when 22 then 12 when 29 then 13 when 19 then 21 when 25 then 22 end from n5dokmag where (pmagdocel=43 or pmagzrod=43)" +_ " and year(ddatawyst) = " +cstr(page_.ctrl(102).value) +_ " and month(ddatawyst) = " +cstr(page_.ctrl(103).value) +_ " order by 2,4")
trans_.message 0,0,"start"
while not oADO.EOF dim oSubTrans: set oSubTrans=trans_.createsubtran()
dim oDokMag : set oDokMag = trans_.getobj(10162, clng(oADO.fields("idobj").value)) trans_.message 0,0, "pobieram: " + oDokMag.strNrDok + ", stary nr op.=" + cstr(oDokMag.nnumoper)
do iNumOper = iNumOper + 1 dim idTestDM:idTestDM = trans_.findobjid(10162, "nnumoper=" + cstr(iNumOper) + " and idobj <> " + cstr(oDokMag.idobj)) if idTestDM<>0then trans_.message 0,0, "pomijam zajety nr op.=" + cstr(iNumOper) end if loop while idTestDM <> 0
if iNumOper > oDokMag.nnumoper then trans_.message 0,0, "Nowy numer operacji ("+ cstr(iNumOper) + ") jest wiekszy niż stary. Przestaw ręcznie dokument aby zrobić miejsce" exit function end if
if iNumOper <> oDokMag.nnumoper then trans_.message 0,0, "zmieniam: " + oDokMag.strNrDok + ", stary nr op.=" + cstr(oDokMag.nnumoper) + ",nowy nr op.="+ cstr(iNumOper) oDokMag.nnumoper = iNumOper if not trans_.saveobjects() then exit function end if end if
page_.updateview
set oDokMag = nothing set oSubTrans = nothing oADO.movenext wend trans_.message 0,0,"stop"
end function
function prdr dim oFra : set oFra = trans_.getobj(10129,5)
dim oU60170 : set oU60170 = doc_.getmodule(60170) dim oTemplate : set oTemplate = doc_.createstreamobj() oTemplate.attach "C:\NAVO2002\SPRZEDAZ\wydruki_iglowe\dmp_95122_faktura_korekta.txt" oU60170.raw_dmp_asp_doc oTemplate,oFra end function
function createstorno dim pNAVOGMSrvr : set pNAVOGMSrvr = trans_.CreateServerExtension("navogm.n5gmsvr") dim varLog 'ma być pusty jeśli nie chcemy logować set varLog = doc_.createstreamobj() pNAVOGMSrvr.createstorno 107381, varLog end function
function movetoarchive dim pNAVOGMSrvr : set pNAVOGMSrvr = trans_.CreateServerExtension("navogm.n5gmsvr") dim varLog 'ma być pusty jeśli nie chcemy logować set varLog = doc_.createstreamobj() pNAVOGMSrvr.movetoarchive 103941, varLog end function
function movefromarchive dim pNAVOGMSrvr : set pNAVOGMSrvr = trans_.CreateServerExtension("navogm.n5gmsvr") dim varLog 'ma być pusty jeśli nie chcemy logować set varLog = doc_.createstreamobj() pNAVOGMSrvr.movefromarchive varLog end function
'CADOExportManager #include "50613"
function crash dim g_pTestObject set g_pTestObject = nothing
dim pColumnElem dim pPos
trans_.var(3011) = CLng(10002) trans_.var(3014) = "R"
set g_pTestObject = trans_.newobj( 10002 ) g_pTestObject.Nazwa = "3.12.16.7.4843"
set pColumnElem = g_pTestObject.listColumn.AddNew() pColumnElem.ComposedPath = "3.12.16.7.4913" 'DANIE TU NATHING NAPRAWIA 'set pColumnElem = nothing
set g_pTestObject = trans_.newobj( 10002 ) g_pTestObject.Nazwa = "3.12.16.7.5727"
trans_.saveobjects 'USUNIECIE DISCARD NAPRAWIA trans_.discard trans_.saveobjects
end function
function rzc dim oSPS : set oSPS = nx_.new_sps() oSPS("ala") = 3 oSPS("bela") = now() oSPS("ula") = "dzizia" oSPS("x") = ccur(3.4) dim onxa : set onxa = nx_.new_array() dim oSPS2 : set oSPS2 = nx_.new_sps() osps2("first") = "pocza" onxa.add osps2 set oSPS("tablica") = onxa trans_.message 0,0,oSPS.ToString() exit function dim strRZC : strRZC = "" do while true
dim oPage : set oPage = doc_.getpagehli("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=20186") oPage.set_rzc strRZC if oPage.domodalauto() <> 1 then exit function end if
strRZC = oPage.get_rzc() trans_.message 0,0,strRZC
loop end function
function podtrejs2 NX_TRACE_SUB_START("podtrejs2") nx_.trace.info "C1","info in podtrejs2" nx_.trace.fatal "C1","FATAL in podtrejs2" 'GS-TO-REVIEW end function
function podtrace NX_TRACE_SUB_START("podtrejs") nx_.trace.info "C1","info in podtrejs" podtrejs2 nx_.trace.info "C1","again in podtrejs" 'GS-TO-REVIEW end function function tracer dim ostr : set ostr = doc_.createstreamobj() nx_.init_trace_manager "root",ostr,doc_ nx_.trace.info "C1","info in root" nx_.trace.error "C1","error in root" podtrace nx_.done_trace_manager ostr.save "c:\temp\root_trace.txt" ostr.rewind dim xmlstr : set xmlstr = doc_.createstreamobj() xmlstr.attach "c:\temp\root_trace.aaa" xmlstr.seektoend dim oNT2P : set oNT2P = nx_.nxtrace2page(xmlstr,0,1) doc_.parsexml oNT2P,ostr end function
function arb dim pm43009 : set pm43009 = doc_.getmodule(43009) dim pm60112 : set pm60112 = doc_.getmodule(60112) dim pkl : set pkl = trans_.getobj(10108,1) dim obowi : set obowi = pm60112.lookup_possible_receipents(pkl,true) obowi.sort pm43009.prepare_array_browser 0,"Wybór odbiorcy maila","Odbiorcy",obowi pm43009.set_options true,true pm43009.run_browser end function
function rapexec dim oRD : set oRD = nx_.new_rapdef(10154,"test") oRD.load_from_string nx_.apprep, page_.ctrl(1541).value dim pM60156 : set pM60156 = doc_.getmodule(60156) dim pSO : set pSO = pM60156.nx_run_raport(nothing,oRD,nothing) pSO.save "c:\temp\nx_stock_raport.txt" end function
function loadrd dim pStream : set pStream = doc_.createstreamobj() pStream.attach "c:\temp\rapdef2.xml" ' oRD.load nx_.apprep, pStream dim oSQ : set oSQ = oRD.create_query(nx_.apprep,0) trans_.message 0,0,oSQ.get_sql() end function
function evaluator dim pM : set pM = doc_.getmodule(60050) dim pE : set pE = pM.new_evaluator() dim pCursor: set pCursor = trans_.createadors("select idobj from n5sprzedaz") do while not pCursor.EOF dim pS : set pS = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,clng(pCursor("idobj"))) trans_.message 0,0,cstr(pE.val(pS,"@curRoznicaBrutto")) pCursor.movenext loop
end function
function apprepos dim oRD : set oRD = nx_.new_rapdef(10131,"NX raport") dim oRef : set oRef = nx_.new_path_ref(10131,"prod_pDostawca") dim oFN : set oFN = nx_.new_path_field(10108,"strNazwa") set oRef.ref_node = oFN oRD.addcol oRef,false,false
set oFN = nx_.new_path_field(10111,"strNazwa") dim oRef2 : set oRef2 = nx_.new_path_ref(10108,"pMiejscowosc") set oRef2.ref_node = ofn set oRef = nx_.new_path_ref(10131,"prod_pDostawca") set oRef.ref_node = oref2 oRD.addcol oRef,false,false trans_.message 0,0,oRD.create_query(nx_.apprep,0).get_sql() end function
function nxasp dim oNXArray : set oNXArray = nx_.new_array() dim oRPF : set oRPF = doc_.system.activex("nxraport.raportparamfactory") dim oTP : set oTP = oRPF.new_text("Nazwisko","t_prac.strNazwisko") dim oTP2 : set oTP2 = oRPF.new_text("Nazwisko2","t_prac.strNazwisko2") dim oDP3 : set oDP3 = oRPF.new_date_range("Data ur.","t_prac.dDataUr",trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)) dim oDP4 : set odP4 = oRPF.new_date("dien","t_mag.dData",trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)) dim oMC : set oMC = oRPF.new_multichoice("MC","t_gr.idobj") dim oSC : set oSC = oRPF.new_singlechoice("SC","t_x.idobj") dim oCP : set oCP = oRPF.new_currency("Liczba", "t_a.curIlosc","PLN",2) oMC.add_item "Grupa 1",1,true oMC.add_item "Grupa 2",2,false oMC.add_item "Grupa 3",3,false oMC.add_item "Grupa 4",4,true
oSC.add_item "one",1 oSC.add_item "two",2
oNXArray.add(oCP).add(oSC).add(oMC).add(oTP).add(oTP2).add(oDP3).add odp4
dim pM : set pM = doc_.getmodule(60170) ' dim pStream : set pStream = doc_.createstreamobj() ' pStream.attach "c:\temp\nxasptest.xml" trans_.var(100) = "tytyl raportu" dim pOpenHLI : set pOpenHLI = doc_.createhli() set pOpenHLI.prop(GVAR_DESTPAGE) = pM.asp_form_(20250,oNXArray) pOpenHLI.prop(GVAR_CMD) = clng(CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE) dim pPage : set pPage = doc_.getpagehli(pOpenHLI) pPage.init_on_params oNXArray trans_.message 1,0, cstr(pPage.domodalauto()) pPage.update_params oNXArray trans_.message 1,0, oNXArray(0).build_where_part end function

set export = nothing exit function

dim dDate1: dDate1 = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) dim dDate2: dDate2 = dDate1 + 10
Dim pKalCP : set pKalCP = doc_.system.activex("navopl.KalCP") pKalCP.init trans_.afc, pKal , dDate1, dDate2

exit function

dim inputIlosc dim inputWartosc
dim outI1 dim outI2
dim outC1 dim outC2
dim ilosc,wartosc ilosc = ccur(0.001) wartosc = ccur(1)
msgbox "start"
dim i,j for i = 0 to 1000 inputIlosc = ccur(ilosc) + ccur(ilosc) * i for j = 0 to 100 inputWartosc = wartosc * ccur(j+1)'ccur(0.01) + ccur(0.01) * j wylicz_rozbicie inputIlosc , inputWartosc , outI1 , outC1 , outI2 , outC2 , 2
if ccur(inputWartosc) <> ccur ( ccur(outI1*outC1) + ccur(outI2*outC2) ) then aaaaaaaa end if
if outI1 < 0 or _ outI2 < 0 or _ outC1 < 0 or _ outC2 < 0 then aaaaaaaaaa end if
next next
msgbox "stop: ilosc=" + cstr(inputIlosc) + " wartosc=" + cstr(inputWartosc)
' for inputIlosc = ccur(0.03) to 100 step ' wylicz_rozbicie curInputIlosc , curInputWartosc , curOutputIlosc1 , curOutputCena1 , curOutputIlosc2 , curOutputCena2 , prec
exit function

function cb
dim pCalendarModule:set pCalendarModule = doc_.getmodule(60231) dim pCB1,pCB2,pCB3,pCB4
page_.ctrl(995).removeall page_.ctrl(996).removeall page_.ctrl(997).removeall page_.ctrl(998).removeall set pCB1 = pCalendarModule.get_calendar_builder(page_.ctrl(995),1,now()) set pCB2 = pCalendarModule.get_calendar_builder(page_.ctrl(996),2,now()) set pCB3 = pCalendarModule.get_calendar_builder(page_.ctrl(997),3,now()) set pCB4 = pCalendarModule.get_calendar_builder(page_.ctrl(998),4,now())
' pCB1.build_frame ' pCB2.build_frame pCB3.build_frame pCB4.build_frame
pCB3.currentday = now() pCB4.currentday = now()
pCB4.restart do pCB4.addtexthli cstr(weekdayname(datepart("w",pcb4.currentday),true)),doc_.createhlistr("varFunction=test") loop while pCB4.nextday exit function
dim pTB:set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach( ).removeall
dim dDataOd:dDataOd = cdate("2004-04-01") dim dDataDo:dDataDo = cdate(srvDate)
pCB.mode = 1 pCB.range dDataOd , dDataDo pCB.attach pTB pCB.bulid
dim cursor
set cursor = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5ZADANIE , "eTypTerminRozp in (2,3,4) and dDataRozp between " + trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dDataOd) + " and " + trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dDataDo) , "" , "") dim zadanie
'dodanie kontrolki w kalendarzu sygnalizujących dzien rozpoczęcia zadania for each zadanie in cursor pCB.currentday(zadanie.dDataRozp).addtext(zadanie.text).addtexthli "->",doc_.createhlistr("varFunction=test") next
set cursor = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5ZADANIE , "eTypTerminZak in (2,3,4) and dDataZakon between " + trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dDataOd) + " and " + trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dDataDo) , "" , "")
'dodanie kontrolki w kalendarzu sygnalizujących dzien zakonczenia zadania for each zadanie in cursor pCB.currentday zadanie.dDataZakon pCB.cell'.bordercolor = '' pCB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE pCB.element'.image = 12 next
'przejrzenie kalendarza dla zakresu dat dim dCurrDay:dCurrDay = dDataOd do while dCurrDay < dDataDo 'rob cos pCB.currentday dCurrDay pCB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE pCB.element'.image = 12
'dodaj dzien dCurrDay = dCurrDay + 1 loop
'iterowanie po kolejnych dniach z zakresu kalendarza pCB.init_iter do while pCB.next_day msgbox cstr(pCB.data) loop
end function
function napelniarka_gm dim idRejestrPW : idRejestrPW = choose_rejestr_dok(cstr(N5REJESTRDOK__PW), true , "Wybierz rejestr PW") dim idRejestrRW : idRejestrRW = choose_rejestr_dok(cstr(N5REJESTRDOK__RW), true , "Wybierz rejestr RW") dim pMagazyn : set pMagazyn = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN,trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN , "strNazwa='Podstawowy'")) dim pSubTrans dim pProdCursor : set pProdCursor = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,"eRodzaj=1", "", "") pProdCursor.forwardonly = false dim iter0
'tu zmieniaj ilość powtórzeń dim pPerf : set pPerf = doc_.performing("napelniarka_gm")
for iter0 = 1 to 10 * 6 pPerf.text = "napelniarka_gm /" + cstr(iter0)
dim nCount : nCount = 10 dim iter for iter = 1 to nCount set pSubTrans=trans_.createsubtran()
if iter = 1 then '1 PW na nCount RW 'PW trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_DOKUMENTOW) = clng(idRejestrPW) trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_TYP) = clng(N5REJESTRDOK__PW) dim pPW : set pPW = trans_.newobj(TYPEID_N5DOKMAG) set pPW.pMagDocel = pMagazyn dim pProdukt
for each pProdukt in pProdCursor dim pPoz : set pPoz = pPW.listPozycje.addnew() set pPoz.pProdukt = pProdukt pPoz.curIloscOpak = ccur((nCount+2) * nCount/2) next end if
'RW trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_DOKUMENTOW) = clng(idRejestrRW) trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_TYP) = clng(N5REJESTRDOK__RW) dim pRW : set pRW = trans_.newobj(TYPEID_N5DOKMAG) set pRW.pMagZrod = pMagazyn
for each pProdukt in pProdCursor set pPoz = pRW.listPozycje.addnew() set pPoz.pProdukt = pProdukt pPoz.curIloscOpak = ccur(iter) next
if not trans_.saveobjects() then trans_.message 1,0, "failed" exit function end if set pProdukt = nothing set pPoz = nothing set pPW = nothing set pRW = nothing
set pSubTrans=nothing next
next end function
function remove_all_from_gm dim pCursor: set pCursor = trans_.createadors("select idobj from n5sprzedaz") do while not pCursor.EOF
dim pSubTrans: set pSubTrans=trans_.createsubtran() trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,clng(pCursor("idobj"))).markdel = true trans_.saveobjects pCursor.movenext loop end function
function napelniarka_dk dim pSubTrans dim i0, i1 for i0 = 1 to 10
set pSubTrans=trans_.createsubtran()
for i1 = 1 to 100 dim pDK dim pKonto : set pKonto = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KONTO,24) trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_DOKUMENTOW) = 26 set pDK = trans_.newobj(TYPEID_N5DOWODKSIEG) dim iter for iter = 1 to 4 with pDK.listDekret.addnew() set .pKonto = pKonto .curWn = ccur(897.65) end with with pDK.listDekret.addnew() set .pKonto = pKonto .curMa = ccur(897.64) end with next next
if not trans_.saveobjects() then exit function end if
set pSubTrans=nothing next end function

function test_tmp_pldekr_sum dim pM : set pM = doc_.getmodule(60192) dim pKonta : set pKonta = pM.plkonto_choicelist_2_array(13) pm.sql_prepare_tmp_pldekr_sum_tbl pKonta pm.sql_prepare_tmp_pldekr_sum_proc pKonta,true,true,"select idobj from n5plnaliczenie" msgbox "OK" pm.sql_clean_tmp_pldekr_sum end function
dim g_idSubPSRURL dim g_idSubPSRZUS dim g_idSubDPON dim g_idSubDRON
function fill_bo
dim idRejWyn : idRejWyn = choose_rejestr_dok("N5REJESTRDOK_WYNAGR", true, "Wybór rejestru") if idRejWyn <= 0 then trans_.message 0,0, "Brak rejestru wynagrodzeń" exit function end if
dim idSklBO :idSklBO = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5PLSCHEMATNAL,"strKOD='BO'") if idSklBO <= 0 then trans_.message 0,0, "Brak składnika wynagrodzeń 'Bilans Otwarcia'" exit function end if
g_idSubPSRZUS=trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5PLSUBKONTO,"strKod='PSRZUS'") g_idSubDPON=trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5PLSUBKONTO,"strKod='DPON'") g_idSubDRON=trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5PLSUBKONTO,"strKod='DRON'") g_idSubPSRURL=trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5PLSUBKONTO,"strKod='PSRURL'")
if g_idSubPSRZUS <= 0 or g_idSubDPON <= 0 or g_idSubDRON <= 0 or g_idSubPSRURL <= 0 then trans_.message 0,0, "Brak subkont niezbednych dla wczytania Bilansu Otwarcia" exit function end if
dim strFileName : strFileName = "C:\temp\bo.xls" dim pM60214 : set pM60214 = doc_.getmodule(60214) dim pForeignConn set pForeignConn = pM60214.connectExcel(strFileName) if pForeignConn is nothing then trans_.message 0,0, "Otwarcie pliku " + strFileName + " nieudane" exit function end if
dim pADORS: set pADORS = pForeignConn.connection.execute("select * from [BO_Plac$]") do while not pADORS.EOF
dim idPrac dim curChor(12) dim curUrl(3)
dim iter for iter=1 to 12 curChor(iter) = ccur(0.0) next for iter=1 to 3 curUrl(iter)=ccur(0.0) next
if not isnull(pADORS("idobj").value) then idPrac = clng(pADORS("idobj").value) curChor(1) = ccur(pADORS("CM12").value) curChor(2) = ccur(pADORS("CM11").value) curChor(3) = ccur(pADORS("CM10").value) curChor(4) = ccur(pADORS("CM9").value) curChor(5) = ccur(pADORS("CM8").value) curChor(6) = ccur(pADORS("CM7").value) curChor(7) = ccur(pADORS("CM6").value) curChor(8) = ccur(pADORS("CM5").value) curChor(9) = ccur(pADORS("CM4").value) curChor(10) = ccur(pADORS("CM3").value) curChor(11) = ccur(pADORS("CM2").value) curChor(12) = ccur(pADORS("CM1").value)
curUrl(1) = ccur(pADORS("UM3").value) curUrl(2) = ccur(pADORS("UM2").value) curUrl(3) = ccur(pADORS("UM1").value)
dim idUmowa, idPozSkl if not fill_single_pozost_skl(idPrac, idSklBO, idUmowa, idPozSkl) then trans_.message 0,0, "Zapis Pozostałych składników dla idPrac=" + cstr(idPrac) + " nieudany" exit function end if if not fill_single_plac_bo(idRejWyn, idUmowa, idPozSkl, idPrac, curChor, curUrl) then trans_.message 0,0, "Zapis Naliczenia dla idPrac=" + cstr(idPrac) + " nieudany" exit function end if end if
pADORS.movenext loop
end function
function fill_single_pozost_skl(idPrac, idSklBO, byref idUmowa, byref idPozSkl) fill_single_pozost_skl = false
dim oCursor : set oCursor = trans_.createadors("select top 1 idobj from n5plumowa where pPracownik=" + cstr(idPrac)+ " order by dDataOd") if oCursor.EOF then trans_.message 0,0, "Brak umowy dla pracownika o idObj=" + cstr(idPrac) exit function end if
idUmowa = clng(oCursor("idobj")) dim oUmowa : set oUmowa= trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PLUMOWA, idUmowa)
dim oPozostSkl : set oPozostSkl = trans_.newobj(TYPEID_N5PLPOZOSTALE) idPozSkl = oPozostSkl.idobj
set oPozostSkl.pPracownik = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK, idPrac) set oPozostSkl.pUmowa = oUmowa oPozostSkl.dDataRej = oUmowa.dDataOd oPozostSkl.dDataOd = oUmowa.dDataOd oPozostSkl.dDataDo = oUmowa.dDataOd
set oPozostSkl.listSkladnik.addnew().pSchemat = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PLSCHEMATNAL, idSklBO)
fill_single_pozost_skl = trans_.saveobjects() end function
function fill_single_plac_bo(idRejWyn, idUmowa, idPozSkl, idPrac, curChor, curUrl) fill_single_plac_bo = false
dim oUmowa : set oUmowa= trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PLUMOWA, idUmowa)
dim idLP : idLP = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5PLLISTAPLAC,_ "lppl_pRejestrDok=" + cstr(idRejWyn)+ " and dDataOd<=" + trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(oUmowa.dDataOd) +_ " and dDataDo>=" + trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(oUmowa.dDataOd)) if idLP <= 0 then trans_.message 0,0, "Brak listy płac dla dnia " + trans_.afc.display.fulldate(oUmowa.dDataOd) exit function end if
trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_DOKUMENTOW) = idRejWyn trans_.var(APPVAR_LISTAPLACE) = idLP
dim oNaliczenie : set oNaliczenie = trans_.newobj(TYPEID_N5PLNALICZENIE) set oNaliczenie.pPracownik = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK, idPrac) oNaliczenie.dDataRej = oUmowa.dDataOd oNaliczenie.dDataOd = oUmowa.dDataOd oNaliczenie.dDataDo = oUmowa.dDataOd set oNaliczenie.pRejestrDok = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5REJESTRDOK, idRejWyn) dim iter
for iter = 1 to 12 with oNaliczenie.listDekret.addnew() .nNumNal = oNaliczenie.nNumNal set .pSubKonto=trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PLSUBKONTO, g_idSubPSRZUS) .curKwota = curChor(iter) .dDataNal = oNaliczenie.dDataNal .nlpdokzrodl = clng(1) .strOpis = "Miesiąc " + cstr(iter-13) set .wrefdokument = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PLPOZOSTALE, idPozSkl) end with with oNaliczenie.listDekret.addnew() .nNumNal = oNaliczenie.nNumNal set .pSubKonto=trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PLSUBKONTO, g_idSubDPON) .curKwota = ccur(1.0) .dDataNal = oNaliczenie.dDataNal .nlpdokzrodl = clng(1) .strOpis = "Miesiąc " + cstr(iter-13) set .wrefdokument = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PLPOZOSTALE, idPozSkl) end with with oNaliczenie.listDekret.addnew() .nNumNal = oNaliczenie.nNumNal set .pSubKonto=trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PLSUBKONTO, g_idSubDRON) .curKwota = ccur(1.0) .dDataNal = oNaliczenie.dDataNal .nlpdokzrodl = clng(1) .strOpis = "Miesiąc " + cstr(iter-13) set .wrefdokument = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PLPOZOSTALE, idPozSkl) end with next
for iter = 1 to 3 with oNaliczenie.listDekret.addnew() .nNumNal = oNaliczenie.nNumNal set .pSubKonto=trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PLSUBKONTO, g_idSubPSRURL) .curKwota = curUrl(iter) .dDataNal = oNaliczenie.dDataNal .nlpdokzrodl = clng(1) .strOpis = "Miesiąc " + cstr(iter-4) set .wrefdokument = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PLPOZOSTALE, idPozSkl) end with next
fill_single_plac_bo = trans_.saveobjects() end function

function MultiCashe_eksport()
dim pMCF set pMCF = new MCFileExport pMCF.open "c:\test.txt"
dim iter dim pStruct: set pStruct = new MCImpExpPliPl
for iter = 1 to 4 set pStruct = new MCImpExpPliPl pStruct.MakeMCFromPlatnosc(clng(iter)) pMCF.add pStruct next
end function
function MultiCashe_import()
dim strImportFileName:strImportFileName = "C:\MC.PLI"
dim pSubTrans set pSubTrans=trans_.createsubtran()
dim pContext:set pContext = new CMCContext set pContext.m_pPerforming = doc_.performing("Trwa importowanie danych MultiCash('" + strImportFileName + "')")
dim pMCF set pMCF = new MCFileImport 'otwórz plik if not pMCF.open(strImportFileName) then dim strText strText = pMCF.error_() set pContext.m_pPerforming = nothing MessageBox strText, "Błąd", vbOKOnly, vbInformation exit function end if
pContext.m_idRejestrBankPrz = clng(0) pContext.m_idRejestrBankRozch = clng(0)
'Pętla czytania z pliku do while true set pContext.m_pPerforming = doc_.performing("Trwa importowanie danych MultiCash('" + strImportFileName + "')")
dim pStruct set pStruct = pMCF.GetNext(pContext) if pStruct is nothing then exit do end if
pStruct.MakePlatnoscFromMC(pContext)
if not trans_.save() then set pContext.m_pPerforming = nothing MessageBox "Nie można zachować importowanych płatności","Błąd", vbOKOnly, vbInformation trans_.discard exit do end if loop
set pContext.m_pPerforming = nothing dim strError:strError = pMCF.error_() if trim(strError) = "" then if trans_.saveobjects() then MessageBox "Operacja importu z pliku MultiCashe powiodła się." ,"Sukces", vbOKOnly, vbInformation MultiCashe = true else MessageBox "Nie można zachować transakcji","Błąd", vbOKOnly, vbInformation MultiCashe = false end if
else MessageBox strError ,"Błąd w sekwencji nr " + cstr(pMCF.m_counter), vbOKOnly, vbInformation end if
set pMCF = nothing set pStruct = nothing trans_.discard set pSubTrans = nothing
end function

class CDebugProcess public debug_time public strProcessName end class
dim g_debugTimer
dim g_strActiveProcess g_strActiveProcess = ""
dim g_startTime g_startTime = 0
dim g_allTime g_allTime = 0
function debug_startProcess(byval strProcessName) g_strActiveProcess = strProcessName g_startTime = Timer end function
function debug_endProcess()
dim end_time end_time = Timer
dim pDebugTime set pDebugTime = nothing
dim i for i=0 to (g_debugTimer.Count()-1) if (g_debugTimer.value(i).strProcessName = g_strActiveProcess) then set pDebugTime = g_debugTimer.value(i) exit for end if next
if (pDebugTime is nothing) then set pDebugTime = new CDebugProcess pDebugTime.debug_time = 0 pDebugTime.strProcessName = g_strActiveProcess
g_debugTimer.add pDebugTime end if
pDebugTime.debug_time = pDebugTime.debug_time + (end_time - g_startTime) g_allTime = g_allTime + (end_time - g_startTime)
end function
function debug_showSummary() dim strMessage strMessage = "Debug times:" + vbNewLine + vbNewLine
if (g_allTime=0) then msgbox "all time is 0" exit function end if
dim i for i=0 to (g_debugTimer.Count()-1) strMessage = strMessage + g_debugTimer.value(i).strProcessName + " = " next
msgbox strMessage
end function

function promocja_test2()
MsgBox "TRANS NEW" dim pP set pP = doc_.performing("Starting...")
dim strPrefix: strPrefix = "X" + CStr(Year(Now)) + " " + CStr(Month(Now)) + " " + CStr(Day(Now)) + " " + CStr(Hour(Now)) + " " + CStr(Minute(Now)) + " " + CStr(Second(Now))
dim i, nCounter: nCounter = 0 dim nMax: nMax = 50000 for i = 0 to nMax
nCounter = nCounter + 1
pP.text = CStr(i) + "/" + CStr(nMax)
dim pObject set pObject = trans_.newobj(TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN)
dim idObject idObject = pObject.IdObj
pObject.strNazwa = strPrefix + " " + CStr(i) pObject.pWaluta = getCurrentFirma().pWaluta
set pObject = nothing
if (nCounter=250) then if (not trans_.saveobjects) then MsgBox "Unable to save data" exit function end if nCounter = 0 end if
dim pObj2 set pObj2 = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN, idObject)
if (pObj2 is nothing) then MsgBox "nothing" debug_now end if
next end function

function loki dim pVLock : set pVLock = trans_.createvlock(1,1) do while not pVLock.lock() if MessageBox("cantlock", "collision", vbYesNo, vbInformation) <> vbYes then exit function end if loop MessageBox "WAIT!","Błąd", vbOKOnly, vbInformation pVLock.unlock
end function
function create_rect(oArena, iLeft, iTop, iWidth, iHeight, clrBackColor, strText) dim oRect : set oRect= oArena.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_PARAGRAPH,-1)
oRect.width = iWidth oRect.height = iHeight oRect.backcolor = clrBackColor oRect.positionstr(cstr(iLeft)+","+cstr(iTop))
oRect.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1).text = strText
end function
